detail.description:
Welcome to Gardenscapes, the first game from the Playrix Scapes™ series! Make match-3 combinations and bring coziness and beauty to every corner of your garden.

Solve fun puzzles, restore and explore new areas of the garden, and meet new friends in every chapter of the exciting storyline. Austin the butler is ready to welcome you to a world of incredible adventures!

Game Features:
● Gameplay loved by millions of players! Make match-3 combinations and decorate your garden while enjoying an ente
detail.releaseNotes:
NEW EVENTS
Cold Peak: Help Rachel find Austin and rescue him in the snowy mountains!
The Case of the Golden Statue: Investigate the burglary and help Rachel clear her name!
Movie Collection: Collect movie-themed cards!

STORYLINE
Find out who will become the new director of the Institute of Modern Butlers!
A new Gardenscapes update is here!
